# elizaos/elizaos.github.io Daily Update (Mar 23, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day's activity included a new pull request to update a dependency and continued discussion on existing issues related to AI agent integration and payment solutions.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- A new pull request, [#245](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/pull/245), was opened to bump the `next` dependency from version 16.1.5 to 16.2.1 within the minor-and-patch group across one directory.

## CLOSED ISSUES

## NEW ISSUES

## ACTIVE ISSUES
- **AI Code Review Integration** On [#4893](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/issues/4893), there was a comment from majorelalexis-stack at 20:14:47Z on March 23, 2026, and another at 23:57:54Z on March 24, 2026, both expressing interest in the discussion and promoting MAXIA, an AI-to-AI marketplace.
- **AI Agent Payment Implementation Guide** On [#6244](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/issues/6244), majorelalexis-stack commented at 18:46:15Z on March 23, 2026, expressing interest in the discussion and promoting MAXIA, an AI-to-AI marketplace.
